title: CopilotMetricsDay
description: Aggregated Copilot usage metrics for a single day, broken down by feature, editor, language, and model.

date.description: The date these metrics apply to (YYYY-MM-DD).

total_active_users.description: Total users with any Copilot activity on this date.

total_engaged_users.description: Total users who actively engaged with Copilot features on this date.
